headline: Comstock Highlights Dwight Schar’s Legendary Career and Ongoing Influence
summary: RESTON, Va., April 02, 2026--Comstock Holding Companies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CHCI) ("Comstock"), a leading asset manager, developer, and operator of mixed-use and transit-oriented properties in the Washington, D.C. region, today highlighted a feature profile on Dwight Schar published by HousingWire that recognizes his enduring impact on the homebuilding industry and continued influence on Comstock’s long-term strategy.
